input_text: Baby bears eat no berries. Clinton defeated Dole. The teacher showed the students a map. The nice Emajogi is 80 kilometers long. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is not a child of X1. Eve failed to finish the report. Mary opened the window to let in air. Daniel went back to the bathroom. Young elephants are not big. The mouse was chased by the cat. "Riga is outside America. Sandra travelled to the hallway. These links present the many viewpoints that existed. The book was read by Sara. Agatha is in trouble. The guide offered the tourists tea. The picture was painted by Leo. The red car is faster than the blue car. John is a father of Mike. The cup filled with water fell. The hand of a man moved a wheel. Winona is a sheep. Earth contains Europe. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. Frogs are small. Americans can not disappear. Tallinn is hardly in Latvia. Sue is a true patriot. Cities in Estonia are estonian. A village road was narrow. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Any person is male or female. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Is the green car faster than the red car?
